Biosynthetic_Pathway.reason: The paper explicitly places BAN in the flavonoid pathway and specifically in condensed tannin/proanthocyanidin biosynthesis.

Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.reason: Results show BAN converts anthocyanidins to corresponding 2,3-cis-flavan-3-ols: cyanidin to epicatechin, pelargonidin to (-)-epiafzelechin, and delphinidin to putative epigallocatechin.
